items.title: Google stopped a zero-day hack that it says was developed with AI
items.summary: For the first time, Google says it has spotted and stopped a zero-day exploit developed with AI. According to a report from Google Threat Intelligence Group (GTIG), "prominent c...

items.title: TikTok launches £3.99 subscription for no ads in UK
items.summary: Those who don't subscribe will be able to use the platform for free - but be shown personalised ads by default.

items.title: ‘Too early’ to talk IPO, Redwood Materials’ incoming CFO says
items.summary: The battery-recycling and energy-storage company has hired former Tesla finance chief Deepak Ahuja, reuniting him with former Tesla CTO JB Straubel.
